mapper.sql: aacr.date, aacr.ac_attendance_record_history_id, aacr.clock_time, aacr.card_machine_no, aacr.attribute1, aacr.attribute2, aacr.attribute3, aacr.attribute4, aacr.attribute5, aacr.id, aacr.update_time, aacr.update_by, aacr.create_time, aacr.create_by,aacr.dispose_by,aacr.dispose_time, aacr.dispose_flag,aacr.check_flag,aacr.dispose_result,aacr.dispose_describes,aacr.req_code,aacr.state, aacr.check_result,aacr.check_describes,aacr.admin_result,aacr.admin_describes,aacr.oa_remark, aacr.code_status, aacr.leader_result, aacr.commit_flag, aacr.self_dispose_time, aacr.leader_dispose_by , aacr.leader_dispose_time, aacr.ac_admin_dispose_time

${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.ac_attendance_record_history_id as ${tAlias}_ac_attendance_record_history_id, ${tAlias}.clock_time as ${tAlias}_clock_time, ${tAlias}.card_machine_no as ${tAlias}_card_machine_no, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.dispose_by as ${tAlias}_dispose_by,${tAlias}.dispose_time as ${tAlias}_dispose_time, ${tAlias}.dispose_flag as ${tAlias}_dispose_flag,${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.dispose_result as ${tAlias}_dispose_result,${tAlias}.dispose_describes as ${tAlias}_dispose_describes, ${tAlias}.req_code as ${tAlias}_req_code,${tAlias}.state as ${tAlias}_state, ${tAlias}.check_result as ${tAlias}_check_result,${tAlias}.check_describes as ${tAlias}_check_describes, ${tAlias}.admin_result as ${tAlias}_admin_result,${tAlias}.admin_describes as ${tAlias}_admin_describes, ${tAlias}.oa_remark as ${tAlias}_oa_remark, ${tAlias}.code_status as ${tAlias}_code_status, ${tAlias}.leader_result as ${tAlias}_leader_result, ${tAlias}.commit_flag as ${tAlias}_commit_flag, ${tAlias}.self_dispose_time as ${tAlias}_self_dispose_time, ${tAlias}.leader_dispose_by as ${tAlias}_leader_dispose_by, ${tAlias}.leader_dispose_time as ${tAlias}_leader_dispose_time, ${tAlias}.ac_admin_dispose_time as ${tAlias}_ac_admin_dispose_time
mapper.insert: insert into ac_abnormal_clock_record (date, ac_attendance_record_history_id, clock_time, card_machine_no, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by, dispose_by,dispose_time,dispose_flag,check_flag, dispose_result,dispose_describes, req_code,state,check_result,check_describes, admin_result,admin_describes,oa_remark, code_status, leader_result, commit_flag) values (#{date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{acAttendanceRecordHistoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{clockTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{cardMachineNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{disposeBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{disposeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{disposeFlag,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{disposeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{disposeDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{checkDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{adminDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{oaRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaderResult, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{commitFlag, jdbcType = BIT})
mapper.update: update ac_abnormal_clock_record set date = #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, ac_attendance_record_history_id = #{acAttendanceRecordHistoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, clock_time = #{clockTime,jdbcType=TIME}, card_machine_no = #{cardMachineNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dispose_by = #{disposeBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dispose_time = #{disposeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, dispose_flag = #{disposeFlag,jdbcType=BIGINT}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dispose_result = #{disposeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispose_describes = #{disposeDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, check_result = #{checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, check_describes = #{checkDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, admin_result = #{adminResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, admin_describes = #{adminDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, req_code = #{reqCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oa_remark = #{oaRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code_status = #{codeStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leader_result = #{leaderResult, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, commit_flag = #{commitFlag, jdbcType = BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update ac_abnormal_clock_record set
dispose_by = #{disposeBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
dispose_time = #{disposeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dispose_flag = #{disposeFlag,jdbcType=BIGINT},
check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=BIGINT},
dispose_result = #{disposeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dispose_describes = #{disposeDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
check_result = #{checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
check_describes = #{checkDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
admin_result = #{adminResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
admin_describes = #{adminDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
req_code = null,
req_code = #{reqCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oa_remark = #{oaRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
code_status = #{codeStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leader_result = #{leaderResult, jdbcType = VARCHAR},
commit_flag = #{commitFlag, jdbcType = BIT},
self_dispose_time = #{selfDisposeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
leader_dispose_by = #{leaderDisposeBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
leader_dispose_time = #{leaderDisposeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ac_admin_dispose_time = #{acAdminDisposeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
attribute5 = '' where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
